headlines.title: Israeli Strike Kills Seven People on Central Beirut Seafront Amid Gulf Tanker Explosions
headlines.summary: Lebanon reports an Israeli strike kills seven on Beirut seafront early Thursday as Hezbollah fires missiles at Israel. Explosions hit two oil tankers in Persian Gulf off Iraq, killing one. Affects Lebanese civilians and global shipping lanes; further strikes expected in escalating war.

headlines.title: Iran War Blocks Strait of Hormuz Disrupting Global Oil and Gas Shipments
headlines.summary: Iran war effectively closes Strait of Hormuz, key Persian Gulf passage for 20% of world oil, driving up gasoline prices. Governments draft reopening plans post-fighting. Impacts consumers and economies worldwide with higher energy costs and supply risks.

headlines.title: Pentagon Reports $11.3 Billion U.S. Cost in First Six Days of Iran War
headlines.summary: Defense officials inform Congress first six days of airstrikes against Iran cost $11.3 billion excluding buildup expenses. Oil surges past $100 per barrel amid Beirut and Tehran strikes. Signals heavy taxpayer burden as conflict persists with uncertain duration.

headlines.title: NASA and SpaceX Launch Four Astronauts to Retrieve Crew Stuck on Space Station
headlines.summary: SpaceX Falcon 9 carries Crew-10 including NASA, JAXA and Roscosmos astronauts from Kennedy Space Center to relieve and return Butch Wilmore and Suni Williams after nine months. Docks Saturday for routine rotation. Ensures continuous ISS research and operations.

headlines.title: Over 45 Democratic Senators Demand Answers on U.S. Involvement in Iran School Strike
headlines.summary: Dozens of Democratic senators press Trump administration for details on evidence linking U.S. to February 28 strike killing 165 at Minab elementary school, mostly children. Seeks Defense Secretary response. Highlights civilian casualty accountability in war.

headlines.title: U.S. Appeals Court Allows Trump Administration to Enforce DEI Program Crackdown
headlines.summary: Fourth Circuit panel lifts block on Trump executive orders halting federal diversity, equity and inclusion initiatives, ruling them likely constitutional. Overrides Maryland judge. Affects government workers and ends DEI support across agencies.

headlines.title: Flash Floods and Landslides Kill 30 in Southern Ethiopia Gamo Zone Highlands
headlines.summary: Heavy rains trigger landslides and floods in Gamo Zone, South Ethiopia Regional State, killing 30 per local authorities. Impacts highland residents and agriculture. Response efforts underway; highlights climate risks in vulnerable areas.

headlines.title: RSF Drone Attack Kills 17 Including Students in Sudan White Nile State
headlines.summary: Rapid Support Forces drone strike kills 17 with students among dead in White Nile State, per Sudanese Doctors Network calling it a horrific crime. Affects civilians in ongoing civil war. Likely prompts investigations and international condemnation.

headlines.title: Displaced Palestinians Cross Military Zone to Return to Northern Gaza
headlines.summary: Israel allows Gazans to cross bisecting military zone after hostage release deadlock ends, enabling returns on foot. Affects displaced families seeking homes. Supports potential reconstruction but tensions persist.
headlines.previousContext: Israel opens crossing of military zone bisecting enclave post-hostage breakthrough

headlines.title: Rwanda-Backed Rebels Overrun Troops and Enter Congo Safe-Haven City Goma
headlines.summary: Rebels enter Goma with gunfire and shelling after defeating Congolese forces; U.N. counts over one million displaced inside city. Threatens aid hub in eastern Congo. Exacerbates humanitarian crisis for refugees.
headlines.previousContext: Rebels overrun troops triggering gunfire and shelling inside city limits
